goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should 'leave after 17:15' and should depart from 'cambridge'.
The train should leave on 'thursday' and should go to 'bishops stortford'.
Make sure you get 'train ID'.
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of 'college' and should be in the 'centre'.
Make sure you get 'postcode'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge

The train should leave on thursday and should go to bishops stortford
Make sure you get train ID
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of college and should be in the centre
